testsuite.name: analizator.ApplicationApiTest

testcase.name: latestAnalysesEndpointRejectsInvalidLimit()
testcase.failure: org.opentest4j.AssertionFailedError: Expected the char sequence to contain the substring. CharSequence <{ "message": "Failed requirement." }>, substring <"message": "limit должен быть в диапазоне от 1 до 100">, ignoreCase <false>. at app//kotlin.test.junit5.JUnit5Asserter.fail(JUnitSupport.kt:56) at app//kotlin.test.Asserter.assertTrue(Assertions.kt:766) at app//kotlin.test.junit5.JUnit5Asserter.assertTrue(JUnitSupport.kt:30) at app//kotlin.test.AssertionsKt__AssertionsKt.assertContains(Assertions.kt:343) at app//kotlin.test.AssertionsKt.assertContains(Unknown Source) at app//kotlin.test.AssertionsKt__AssertionsKt.assertContains$default(Assertions.kt:342) at app//kotlin.test.AssertionsKt.assertContains$default(Unknown Source) at app//analizator.ApplicationApiTest$latestAnalysesEndpointRejectsInvalidLimit$1.invokeSuspend(ApplicationApiTest.kt:140) at app//kotlin.coroutines.jvm.internal.BaseContinuationImpl.resumeWith(ContinuationImpl.kt:34) at app//kotlinx.coroutines.DispatchedTask.run(DispatchedTask.kt:100) at app//kotlinx.coroutines.internal.LimitedDispatcher$Worker.run(LimitedDispatcher.kt:124) at app//kotlinx.coroutines.scheduling.TaskImpl.run(Tasks.kt:89) at app//kotlinx.coroutines.scheduling.CoroutineScheduler.runSafely(CoroutineScheduler.kt:586) at app//kotlinx.coroutines.scheduling.CoroutineScheduler$Worker.executeTask(CoroutineScheduler.kt:829) at app//kotlinx.coroutines.scheduling.CoroutineScheduler$Worker.runWorker(CoroutineScheduler.kt:717) at app//kotlinx.coroutines.scheduling.CoroutineScheduler$Worker.run(CoroutineScheduler.kt:704)
